Type            Value                Line   Col   
------------------------------------------------------------
PROGRAM         program              2      1     
ID              p                    2      9     
VAR             var                  3      1     
INTEGER         integer              4      5     
ID              a                    4      13    
;               ;                    4      14    
BEGIN           begin                5      1     
ID              a                    6      5     
:=              :=                   6      7     
INTC            1                    6      10
